prompt: Minimalist app icon on pure black background. A pair of eyeglasses drawn with thin glowing neon green lines. The left lens contains a terminal/command prompt symbol: a greater-than sign followed by an underscore cursor '>_' in the same glowing green. The right lens is empty (just the circular outline). The glasses frame is simple and clean - thin rounded rectangular or slightly rounded lens shapes connected by a nose bridge, with short temple arms extending outward. The entire design uses only glowing neon green (#00FF41) lines on black, with a soft phosphor bloom/glow effect like a retro green CRT terminal monitor. No fills, no text outside the lens, no extra decorations. The >_ cursor should be clearly readable. Ultra minimal, iconic, perfect as a small mobile app icon.
